title: Multi-Vendor Healthcare E-Commerce Platform
subtitle: Cross-Border Marketplace with ERP Integration
overview: Cross-border multi-vendor marketplace with intelligent vendor matching, ERP integration, and 20+ third-party API orchestrations.
architectureHighlights: Full Acumatica ERP integration (inventory, orders, pricing)
20+ third-party API orchestration with retry logic

caseStudy.problem: Healthcare supply businesses operating across US and Canada needed a unified e-commerce platform handling multi-vendor catalogs, cross-border logistics, and ERP-synced inventory — while ensuring customers always get products from the nearest, most cost-effective vendor.
caseStudy.solution: Designed and built a multi-vendor marketplace serving two countries in 7 languages, with an intelligent vendor matching engine factoring proximity and commission rates, fully integrated with Acumatica ERP.
myRole: Led the full backend architecture design (Laravel/PHP)
Architected and built the ERP integration layer (Acumatica)
Designed the vendor matching algorithm (proximity + commission logic)
caseStudy.architecture:
graph TD
    A[Customer Search] --> B[Product Discovery Engine]
    B --> C{Vendor Matching Logic}
    C --> |Nearest Location| D[Geo-Proximity Check]
    C --> |Product Available| E[Inventory Check via ERP]
    C --> |Best Commission| F[Commission Ranking]
    D & E & F --> G[Optimal Vendor Selected]
    G --> H[Order Processing]
    H --> I[Acumatica ERP Sync]
    H --> J[Shipping - ICS / Purolator / USPS]
    H --> K[Payment Processing]
    L[Vendor Portal] --> M[Product Upload]
    M --> N[Catalog Sync]
    N --> O[Google Merchant Center]
    N --> P[Facebook / Instagram Shops]

technicalDecisions.reasoning: Complex ERP integration benefits from unified codebase

technicalDecisions.decision: Acumatica as inventory source of truth
technicalDecisions.reasoning: Vendors manage stock in ERP; platform syncs in near real-time
Laravel i18n system across US/Canada (7 languages)
Centralized service layer with retry logic and failure handling

challenges: Vendor matching algorithm — Proximity + commission ranking with real-time inventory checks via ERP.
ERP integration depth — Two-way Acumatica sync with conflict resolution.
20+ API orchestration — Each with different auth, rate limits, and failure modes.
Cross-border complexity — Different tax rules, carriers, currency, compliance (US vs Canada).
Multi-language support — 7 languages across all customer-facing content and transactional messages.
